summary: Comprehensive test suite for App model with 28 tests covering view switching, key bindings, error handling, loading states, refresh/summarize operations, filtering, and multi-source integration
side_effects: Defines test fixtures: setupTestStore (opens temp SQLite), seedTestData (inserts test channels/messages/summaries)
Defines mock implementations: mockRefreshSvc, mockSummarizeSvc for interface injection testing

28 test functions organized by feature: view switching, key handling, loading states, error auto-clear, refresh/summarize triggering and completion, status bar rendering, source addition, filtering, multi-source integration
notes: Tests cover all major Update branches and View rendering paths. Uses both isolated unit tests (e.g., key binding handling) and integration tests (e.g., TestApp_MultiSourceIntegration which creates real storage, channels, and messages). Mocks are tracked for state (called, sourceNames, channelIDs). Tests verify state mutations, command generation, and error handling.
